display_text: Cost: 1000: Refresher Shard is a consumable that resets the cooldowns of all your items and abilities upon use, sharing a cooldown with Refresher Orb. It provides immediate stat bonuses including health regeneration, mana regeneration, and damage. Its cooldown only progresses while the item is in your main inventory. Stats: CD: 180s, Mana Cost: 200, Charges: 1, Heal Regen: +12, Mana Regen: +6, Damage: +20.

display_text: Cost: 1000: Stat bonuses include significant passive health regeneration and a moderate boost to mana regeneration, aiding sustain alongside a notable +20 damage bonus. This makes it a useful stat stick even before the active is used. Stats: Heal Regen: +12, Mana Regen: +6, Damage: +20.

display_text: Cost: 1000: The Refresher Shard's primary function is a single, high-impact use to reset abilities, effectively allowing for two major ultimate casts in a fight or the back-to-back use of critical actives like BKB or Satanic. It is a game-changing tool in late-game, high-stakes engagements. Stats: CD: 180s, Mana Cost: 200.

display_text: Cost: 1000: An essential late-game purchase for heroes with long cooldown, high-impact ultimates (e.g., Enigma, Tidehunter, Faceless Void) or those reliant on powerful active items. It is shareable, allowing a support to grant it to a core hero. It shares a cooldown with Refresher Orb, making them mutually exclusive. Stats: CD: 180s, Charges: 1.
